overall.description: First-person motorcycle ride through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, navigating neon-lit streets, passing under elevated highways, colliding with a vehicle at an intersection, and stopping at a major downtown intersection surrounded by towering corporate skyscrapers with bright holographic advertisements.

events.description: entering covered underpass with artificial ceiling lighting and green support pillars
exiting underpass back to open street with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through urban streets following a red sedan, passing under an elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying pink anime-style character advertisement
illuminated overhead speed limit sign showing number 10
continuous metal guardrail along the right side of the road
massive concrete highway overpass with support columns

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet multi-lane city street at night, passing a pink neon billboard. The rider follows a red sedan under a concrete overpass, transitioning through a covered section with artificial lighting before emerging back into the neon-lit open street.

events.description: making right turn at intersection with stop sign painted on road
collision with black car turning right from the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersection, turning right at stop sign, then colliding with a vehicle on the right side and recovering

notable_agents.action: black car turning right cuts into motorcycle path causing collision

entered.detail: large white STOP text painted on the asphalt road surface
commercial building with red neon Fuyutsuki signage

segments.scene_description: The rider turns right at an intersection marked with a large stop sign, passing the Fuyutsuki building. While navigating the turn, the motorcycle collides with a black car entering from the right, causing the bike to skid before recovering and continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with bars and storefronts

agents.ego_description: accelerating through dense neon commercial district with heavy signage and pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: large red neon sign for Brooklyn Barista establishment
storefront with bright purple neon lighting and vertical signs
large gantry structure spanning the road with multiple digital screens

segments.scene_description: Following the collision, the rider accelerates through a vibrant commercial district lined with neon signs including the prominent Brooklyn Barista. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks beneath glowing purple and red storefronts as the motorcycle passes under overhead billboard structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with corporate skyscrapers

events.description: stopping at red traffic light at major intersection with towering buildings
traffic light changes to green, proceeding through the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at red light waiting to cross major intersection, then accelerating through on green light

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at the red light alongside the motorcycle

entered.detail: massive illuminated skyscraper with Orbital Air corporate signage
cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with various holographic advertisements
traffic signal pole showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches a major downtown intersection dominated by the massive Orbital Air skyscraper and surrounding corporate towers. Stopping at a red light next to a black SUV, the camera waits before accelerating through the crosswalk as the light turns green, with the towering buildings filling the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide multi-lane avenue with overhead billboards

agents.ego_description: accelerating to high speed down wide avenue passing under multiple billboard gantries

notable_agents.action: red car driving ahead in the distance on the same avenue

entered.detail: tall bridge support towers visible in the distance against the night sky
large digital screens displaying moving advertisements on the right side

segments.scene_description: Crossing the intersection, the rider accelerates down a wide multi-lane avenue. The Orbital Air building recedes to the left as the motorcycle passes under overhead billboard gantries and digital screens, with distant bridge towers visible ahead against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle ride through a neon-drenched metropolis, moving from sheltered underpasses into the heart of a towering corporate district. It begins on a wet multi-lane street, passing a pink neon billboard and following a red sedan through a concrete overpass before emerging back into the open night. As the rider turns right past the Fuyutsuki building, the camera jolts during a collision with a black car, recovering quickly to accelerate through a vibrant commercial district lined with purple and red storefronts and the Brooklyn Barista. The scene then opens up at a major downtown intersection dominated by the massive Orbital Air skyscraper, where the bike pauses beside a black SUV before surging forward as the light turns green. Finally, the camera speeds down a wide avenue, leaving the corporate towers behind and passing under digital gantries toward distant bridge towers on the horizon.
